name: Jim Zhou
title: Senior Software Development Engineer
summary: Senior SDE with 5 years of experience building scalable backend systems, full-stack web applications, and cloud-native infrastructure. Primary expertise in Python, with strong skills in Go and TypeScript. Currently pivoting toward AI infrastructure — studying LLM serving, GPU inference optimization, and building hands-on projects in ML systems.

bullets: Led design and development of a high-throughput data pipeline processing 500K+ events/sec using Python and Kafka
Built and maintained full-stack internal tools with React and FastAPI, improving developer productivity by 40%
Architected infrastructure-as-code deployment workflows with Terraform and Kubernetes across multi-region clusters
Mentored team of 4 engineers, conducted code reviews, and established engineering best practices
Developed RESTful APIs and microservices in Python (Django/FastAPI) serving 10M+ daily requests
Implemented distributed caching layer with Redis reducing API latency by 60%
Built CI/CD pipelines and automated testing infrastructure, achieving 95% code coverage
Built full-stack features for a SaaS platform using Python, Flask, and React
Designed and optimized PostgreSQL schemas and query patterns for high-traffic workloads
Implemented real-time notification system using WebSockets and message queues
